constraints.notes: HD only — Media Group RTL Germany does not accept SD small items.

container.notes: MXF OP 1a per SMPTE RDD9-2013 and SMPTE 378M.

frame_rate.notes: 1080i/25 native; 1080psF/25 accepted for original film material.

color.notes: Video signal must conform to ITU-R BT.709-6 throughout the spot.

gop.notes: XDCAM HD 422 is Long-GOP (M=3, N=12). Closed-GOP not explicitly required by spec.

codec.notes: PCM, discrete tracks (AES-3 / SMPTE 302M). Dolby E streams are explicitly not accepted.

track_count.notes: 8 mono tracks, 1 channel per track. Unused tracks must carry AES-0 (digital mute).

layout.notes: At minimum tracks 1+2 must contain the complete programme sound (stereo or 2-track mono). Stereo must be mono-compatible (correlation ≥ 0). 5.1 multi-channel optional on tracks 3–8.

loudness.notes: Per EBU Tech 3343 §10.1 (Commercials and Trailers). Maximum short-term loudness must not exceed -18 LUFS (+5 LU). EBU-mode loudness meter required (ITU-R BS.1770 K-weighting, 4× oversampled true-peak). PPM/QPPM meters are not suitable.

metadata.notes: EBU recommendations binding where this spec is silent.

programme_layout.program_start: First frame — no technical credits, no black.
programme_layout.program_end: Last frame, or 4 black frames with mute audio.

timeline.notes: Start timecode 00:00:00:00 at SOM (first picture), ascending linearly for the spot duration. All timecode tracks on a single medium must carry identical values.

packaging.notes: Online file transfer preferred via secure web interface at https://ingest.rtl-service.de/ingest-kleinmaterial/ (one-time free registration required).

luminance.tolerance_note: Maximum luminance must not exceed 100% (700 mV). Pedestal 0–2%. No invalid signal levels per EBU R103. 8-bit limited range: 16–235.

rgb.tolerance_note: EBU R103 / 'Video Range' compliance required throughout the spot.

contacts.notes: RTL Technology GmbH, Content Quality & Processing, Picassoplatz 1, 50679 Köln. Late deliveries: +49 221 456 422 20.

governance.notes: Media Group RTL Germany delivery spec for small items (commercials/spots/trailers). HD only via web upload. XDCAM HD 422 50 Mbps in MXF OP1a; 1080i/25 (or 25psF for film source); 8 PCM mono audio tracks at 48 kHz/24-bit (Stereo L/R + 5.1 FL/FR/C/LFE/SL/SR); EBU R128 -23 LUFS ±0.2 LU, true peak ≤ -1 dBTP; ITU-R BT.709-6; EBU R95 action safe 3.5%; SOM timecode 00:00:00:00. Latest version always at https://www.rtl-service.de/richtlinien.html.
